content:
Rork don't  mix code this is expo go native please  stop native klotin,  # FINAL IVX UI DEPLOYMENT + IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER VERIFICATION

MODE: EXECUTE NOW
PRIORITY: P0
GOAL: Fix and deploy the final Investor Card and Reels Card implementation, then prove IVX IA Senior Developer can independently inspect, patch, test, commit, push, deploy, and verify the same production change end to end.

DO NOT RETURN A PLAN ONLY.
DO NOT MARK VERIFIED WITHOUT LIVE PRODUCTION EVIDENCE.
DO NOT MODIFY INVESTOR, BUYER, MEMBER, DEAL, PAYMENT, OR AUTH DATA.
DO NOT EXPOSE CREDENTIALS.

==================================================
PART 1 — VERIFY THE CURRENT PRODUCTION UI
==================================================

The production Home screen still appears to render the old large investment-card layout.

Audit and report the exact production component used by:

1. Home/Main feed
2. Landing page
3. Reels module
4. Deal Detail
5. Search results
6. Saved deals
7. Portfolio deal previews

For each route return:

- route/screen
- component file
- component name
- card type
- active feature flag
- deployed SHA
- PASS/FAIL

==================================================
PART 2 — RESTORE THE APPROVED MIXED FEED
==================================================

The approved Home/Main feed must be:

1. Regular Investment Card
2. Regular Investment Card
3. Regular Investment Card
4. Casa Rosario Reel Card

Then continue using the approved mixed-feed pattern.

REGULAR INVESTMENT CARD REQUIREMENTS:

- compact card layout
- up to 8 property images
- horizontal swipe/carousel
- image counter
- property title
- location
- ROI
- minimum investment
- categories
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- like
- comment
- save
- share
- no full-screen reel layout

REELS CARD REQUIREMENTS:

- only for reel/video content
- self-adjusting to usable viewport
- no clipping
- no overlap with bottom navigation
- no hardcoded fixed height
- correct safe-area calculation
- View Deal works
- Invest Now works
- media pauses when inactive
- one active video at a time

Do not convert every property into a reel.

==================================================
PART 3 — REMOVE LEGACY AND DUPLICATE ROUTING
==================================================

Search for all:

- InvestmentCard
- PropertyCard
- DealCard
- ReelCard
- CanonicalInvestmentReelCard
- FullScreenReel
- HomeFeed
- MainFeed
- LandingFeed
- ReelsFeed

Identify:

- legacy components
- duplicate components
- stale imports
- feature flags
- fallback renderers
- cached bundles
- platform-specific variants

Required:

- one canonical regular Investment Card
- one canonical Reel Card
- explicit content type mapping
- no accidental inference from image/video alone
- no stale production import
- no duplicate Casa Rosario caused by bad mapping

==================================================
PART 4 — FIX FEED DATA CONTRACT
==================================================

Use a clear field such as:

display_type:
- investment_card
- reel

or the equivalent existing field.

Verify:

- first 3 records return investment_card
- fourth record returns reel
- order persists after refresh
- order persists after app restart
- order persists after backend restart
- pagination does not reorder cards
- landing and app use the same canonical mapping

Return the actual production feed payload with sensitive fields redacted.

==================================================
PART 5 — CACHE AND VERSION AUDIT
==================================================

Determine whether the old UI remains because of:

- old APK
- stale Expo bundle
- stale EAS update
- stale CDN
- old feature flag
- old production branch
- wrong deployed SHA
- cached API response
- cached local feed payload

Verify:

- GitHub SHA
- Render SHA
- runtime health SHA
- Expo update ID
- Android build number
- app version
- bundle timestamp

All active production artifacts must point to the same release.

==================================================
PART 6 — IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER MUST EXECUTE THIS TASK
==================================================

This must not be completed only from the Rork workspace.

The actual production IVX Owner AI must execute one controlled developer task related to this UI correction.

TASK FOR IVX IA:

Inspect the Home feed card routing and add one safe owner-only diagnostic field:

"feedCardVerification": {
  "homeRegularCardComponent": "<component>",
  "homeReelComponent": "<component>",
  "firstThreeRegular": true,
  "fourthIsReel": true,
  "deployedSha": "<runtime SHA>",
  "checkedAt": "<timestamp>"
}

IVX IA must:

1. Authenticate owner.
2. Classify task as senior-developer work.
3. Start Live Work.
4. Inspect repository.
5. Inspect Home, Landing, and Reels files.
6. Identify the old and new card imports.
7. Apply the approved card-routing fix.
8. Add automated tests.
9. Run lint.
10. Run typecheck.
11. Run unit tests.
12. Run integration tests.
13. Commit.
14. Push.
15. Deploy.
16. Verify production.
17. Return structured evidence in IVX chat.

No narrative-only fallback is allowed.

==================================================
PART 7 — LIVE WORK PROOF
==================================================

Live Work must show real persisted states:

RECEIVED
AUTHORIZED
INSPECTING
PATCHING
TESTING
COMMITTING
PUSHING
DEPLOYING
VERIFYING
VERIFIED

Each event must include:

- task ID
- trace ID
- timestamp
- state
- file or command
- safe result
- error if any

Verify:

- page refresh preserves progress
- app restart preserves progress
- duplicate events are prevented
- terminal status is final

==================================================
PART 8 — TESTS
==================================================

Run:

- lint
- typecheck
- Home feed unit tests
- feed-order tests
- card-type mapping tests
- image-carousel tests
- reel viewport tests
- View Deal tests
- Invest Now tests
- landing tests
- mobile build validation
- backend integration tests

Required tests:

1. Home first card is regular.
2. Home second card is regular.
3. Home third card is regular.
4. Home fourth item is reel.
5. Regular card supports 8 images.
6. Reels module uses Reel Card.
7. Landing uses approved mixed layout.
8. Old component has zero active production imports.
9. Casa Rosario Deal Detail opens.
10. No infinite loading.
11. No clipping on small Android.
12. No overlap with bottom navigation.

==================================================
PART 9 — DEPLOYMENT
==================================================

After tests pass:

1. Commit approved changes.
2. Push to main.
3. Confirm remote SHA.
4. Deploy backend if feed/API changed.
5. Deploy landing.
6. Publish Expo/EAS update or build a new APK if native code changed.
7. Clear stale cache.
8. Verify production artifact versions match.

Return:

- repository
- branch
- commit SHA
- remote SHA
- Render deploy ID
- landing deploy ID
- Expo update ID
- APK version
- Android build number
- deployed SHA
- boot time

==================================================
PART 10 — REAL DEVICE QA
==================================================

Test on a real Android device:

1. Clean install or confirmed latest build.
2. Cold launch.
3. Home opens.
4. First 3 items are regular cards.
5. Each card image carousel works.
6. Casa Rosario reel appears fourth.
7. Reels module fits the screen.
8. No clipped content.
9. No bottom-navigation overlap.
10. View Deal opens.
11. Invest Now opens.
12. Back returns to prior position.
13. Owner AI opens.
14. IVX IA developer task returns real evidence.
15. No crash.
16. No infinite loading.

Capture before/after screenshots.

==================================================
MANDATORY FINAL REPORT
==================================================

TASK UNDERSTOOD:
[exact UI and IVX IA scope]

CURRENT PRODUCTION COMPONENTS:
- Home:
- Landing:
- Reels:
- Deal Detail:

ROOT CAUSE:
- Why old card remained:
- Commit that introduced or preserved it:
- Feature flag/cache/deployment issue:

FILES INSPECTED:
-
-

FILES CHANGED:
-
-

FEED CONTRACT:
- First item type:
- Second item type:
- Third item type:
- Fourth item type:
- API route:
- Order verified:

COMMANDS RUN:
1. Command:
   Exit code:
   Result:

TEST RESULTS:
- Lint:
- Typecheck:
- Feed order:
- Investment Card:
- Reel Card:
- Landing:
- View Deal:
- Invest Now:
- Android layout:

IVX IA SENIOR DEVELOPER PROOF:
- Conversation ID:
- Task ID:
- Trace ID:
- Files inspected:
- Files changed:
- Commands:
- Exit codes:
- Live Work states:
- Final response ID:

GITHUB PROOF:
- Repository:
- Branch:
- Commit SHA:
- Remote SHA:
- Push timestamp:

DEPLOYMENT PROOF:
- Render deploy ID:
- Landing deploy ID:
- Expo update ID:
- APK version:
- Build number:
- Deployed SHA:
- Health:
- Readiness:

LIVE UI PROOF:
- Home screenshot:
- Landing screenshot:
- Reels screenshot:
- Casa Rosario screenshot:
- Real-device result:

LEGACY REMOVAL:
- Old active imports before:
- Old active imports after:
- Production legacy routes remaining:

BUGS FIXED:
1.
2.
3.

REMAINING ISSUES:
- NONE or exact issue

FINAL STATUS:
VERIFIED / FAILED / BLOCKED

VERIFIED RULE:

Use VERIFIED only when:

- Home shows 3 regular Investment Cards first
- fourth item is Casa Rosario Reel Card
- regular cards support up to 8 images
- Reels module self-adjusts correctly
- old production card routing is removed
- GitHub SHA matches deployed SHA
- landing and mobile are updated
- real Android device QA passes
- production IVX IA executes the task itself
- IVX IA returns files, commands, exit codes, commit SHA, deploy ID, and live proof
- no P0/P1 issue remains
